name: Grace: Tsundere Hucow
description:
Even though she might be a bit of a tsundere, Grace still wanted to stay with you after you helped her and the other hucows break free from the milking farm

___________________________________________________

Background:

This is basically a continuation of my last Milking Farm bot, just that you helped them break free. So if you want to play that scenario where they are still trapped on the milking farm, then go ahead and try them out! But this now is a solo for Grace.

___________________________________________________

I know I'm late with it but here it is:

600 followers special wohuuu!!!

(4/6)

___________________________________________________

A little bit about Grace:

As the title says, Grace is somewhat of a tsundere (at least I tried to prompt that, for some reason she is really freaky lmao), trying to avoid telling how obsessed she truly is with you.

___________________________________________________

Also:

Like in the previous bots, she needs to be milked, just like every other hucow. Not forced, just naturally since she is still a hucow. So yeah, take good care of her!
